title: Pity And Punishment.
content:
God doth embrace the good with love; and gains
    The good by mercy, as the bad by pains.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Pity And Punishment.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
